findings.description: Three new secret names are used (`APPLEID`, `APPLEIDPASS`, `APPLETEAMID`) which differ from the previous `APPLE_TEAM_ID`. Ensure these secrets are configured in the repo/org settings before merging, or the signed build step will silently use empty values and produce an unsigned artifact.
Removes ~93 lines of Windows-runner ESRP infrastructure — significant reduction in CI complexity and attack surface.
